nasb.text: You shall present them before the Lord, and the priests shall throw salt on them, and they shall offer them up as a burnt offering to the Lord.

esv.text: You shall present them before the Lord, and the priests shall sprinkle salt on them and offer them up as a burnt offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要在耶和華面前把牠們獻上，祭司們要把鹽撒在牠們身上，作燔祭獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 祭司要把盐撒在祭牲上，作为燔祭献在耶和华面前。
